allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, @{N='Mem\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet/1MB,1\)}})
PowerShell($dbPath = "C:\\data\\db"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dbPath\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dbPath | Out-Null; "Created $dbPath" } else { "Exists: $dbPath" })
